kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: TC-NEG-01 Login with Non Existent User

kw.name: Open Application
Should Not Be Empty
kw.arg: Base URL must not be empty. Please set it in config/env.yaml
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Opens the application

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: Login error verified — invalid credentials rejected
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Close Application
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closing the application

test.doc: Verify that logging in with a username that doesnt exist shows an error

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: TC-NEG-02 Blank Transfer Amount

kw.name: Open Application
Should Not Be Empty
kw.arg: Base URL must not be empty. Please set it in config/env.yaml
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Opens the application

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Get List Items
kw.doc: Returns all labels or values of selection list ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Get List Items
kw.doc: Returns all labels or values of selection list ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Select From List By Index
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=fromAccountId' by index 0.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.

kw.name: Select From List By Index
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=toAccountId' by index 0.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: Transfer correctly rejected — Transfer Complete did not appear
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Close Application
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closing the application

test.doc: Submit the transfer form without entering an amount and check for validation

test.name: TC-NEG-05 Invalid Account ID via API

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=parabank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=<requests.auth.HTTPBasicAuth object at 0x000001AAABAAD6A0>, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/accounts/000000 path_url=/parabank/services/bank/accounts/000000 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Basic am9objpkZW1v'} body=None

GET Response : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/accounts/000000 status=400, reason=Bad Request headers={'Date': 'Sat, 20 Jun 2026 08:40:46 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/plain;charset=UTF-8', 'Content-Length': '25', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'CF-RAY': 'a0e978784e4a0029-BOM'} body=Could not find account #0

C:\Users\mridu\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'parabank.parasoft.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are equal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: Call GET /accounts/000000 with a fake account ID — expect a 4xx response

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: TC-NEG-06 Login API with Invalid Credentials

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=parabank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/login/baduser_xyz/wrongpass123 path_url=/parabank/services/bank/login/baduser_xyz/wrongpass123 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/login/baduser_xyz/wrongpass123 status=400, reason=Bad Request headers={'Date': 'Sat, 20 Jun 2026 08:40:46 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/plain;charset=UTF-8', 'Content-Length': '32', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'CF-RAY': 'a0e9787bdc582eaa-BOM'} body=Invalid username and/or password

C:\Users\mridu\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'parabank.parasoft.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are equal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: Call login API with wrong credentials — expect a non-200 response
